codex_consult.feedback_summary: Codex raised 6 PROPOSED_FIX items and 3 OBSERVATION_ONLY items. After classification: (1) '; echo 0' on expected-0 checks — explicitly authorized by iteration 3 dispatch directive; (2) AC4 not self-contained — dev execution concern, GIVEN clause governs preconditions; (3) AC4 additive-only check weakness — OBSERVATION_ONLY; (4) --no-index recommendation — dev implementation guidance; (5) AC5 commit-order ambiguity — Technical Hints section resolves ambiguous dependency listing; (6) on-disk report still shows iter 2 fail — resolved by writing this report. No Codex finding introduces a new blocking spec_text_vs_execution_drift.
